body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41184", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-532", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File"}], "description": "In Calico, the install-cni init container logs the rendered CNI configuration to standard output. When the configuration template uses the __SERVICEACCOUNT_TOKEN__ placeholder (Canal/Flannel-Calico deployments), the installer substitutes the live Kubernetes ServiceAccount bearer token before logging, exposing the token to any authenticated user with pods/log permission in the namespace with calico-node. The token holds patch privileges on pods/status, enabling annotation-based attacks against cluster workloads. The default kubeconfig-based authentication path is not affected. This is a direct regression of TTA-2018-001.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00504, "percentile": 0.39525}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9p7w-w5q6-mxj3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T18:01:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9p7w-w5q6-mxj3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9p7w-w5q6-mxj3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41184"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T17:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T18:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41184", "https://github.com/projectcalico/calico/pull/12502", "https://github.com/projectcalico/calico/pull/12526", "https://github.com/projectcalico/calico/pull/12527", "https://www.tigera.io/security-bulletins/tta-2026-001", "https://github.com/projectcalico/calico/commit/0ca653db0ae7400ea9fb066daa7f45c902482271", "https://github.com/projectcalico/calico/commit/cd73bc2cea0f4989772f2deb93909e7cfac927e0", "https://github.com/projectcalico/calico/commit/da9ea3a13927a35e4022b787d17a005b2157d812", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9p7w-w5q6-mxj3"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/projectcalico/calico", "summary": "Calico Inserts Sensitive Information into Log File", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T18:01:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9p7w-w5q6-mxj3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.31.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/projectcalico/calico"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, < 3.31.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.11.0-cni-plugin.0.20260417001138-cd73bc2cea0f", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/projectcalico/calico"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.11.0-cni-plugin.0.20260417001138-cd73bc2cea0f"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
